source: Vibriance Super C Serum OTO1 upsell page
description: One-Time Offer upsell page with countdown timer, progress bar, persuasion copy, pricing strikethrough, and yes/no CTA. Post-checkout upsell for supplement/skincare products.

page_title.description: SEO page title (product name or offer name)

logo_image_url.description: Brand logo image URL. Displayed at top of page.

wait_banner.description: Attention-grabbing banner text at top of page. Must create urgency and stop the user from leaving.
wait_banner.example: WAIT! Your order is not complete!

progress_text.description: Text inside progress bar. Shows order completion status.

upsell_headline.description: Main upsell offer headline. Must state the exact deal: quantity + product name + price per unit.
upsell_headline.example: Upgrade your order and get 3 more bottles of Super C Serum for ONLY $28.20 each!

countdown_label.description: Text before the countdown timer. Creates urgency.

countdown_minutes.description: Countdown timer duration in minutes. Usually 10 minutes.

persuasion_1.description: Hook paragraph (bold). Opens the persuasion sequence. Addresses a specific pain point or desire that requires stocking up.
persuasion_1.example: If you're looking to firm your jowls or reduce your age spots we recommend stocking up as it can take several months to see impressive results in those areas.

persuasion_2.description: Offer explanation. Restates what the customer gets in the upsell deal.
persuasion_2.example: We've upgraded your order so you can claim 3 extra bottles of Vibriance Super C Serum at a substantial discount.

persuasion_3.description: Price anchoring. Compares upsell price to retail/competitor prices to show value.
persuasion_3.example: You'll never see Super C Serum this low. It retails for $47 a bottle and comparable serums sell for over $79 per bottle.

persuasion_4.description: Scarcity trigger (bold). Creates fear of missing out with stock/supply urgency.
persuasion_4.example: We're also expecting to go out of stock very soon...

persuasion_5.description: Action step. Tells customer exactly what to do and why.
persuasion_5.example: Add 3 more bottles to your order so you can continue to enjoy beautifully glowing skin - even if we do run out of stock in the coming weeks.

persuasion_6.example: All orders are protected by a 1 year 'bottom of the bottle' money back guarantee.

persuasion_7a.description: Risk reversal part 1 (bold). Bold statement about refund policy.
persuasion_7a.example: If you don't get the promised results you can call us back for a full refund -

persuasion_7b.description: Risk reversal part 2. Completes the guarantee promise.
persuasion_7b.example: even if you use all the bottles!

product_image_url.description: Product bundle/offer image URL. Shows the actual product being offered.

original_price.description: Original/retail price shown with strikethrough. Must include $ symbol.

discount_badge.description: Discount percentage badge text. Shows savings percentage.

sale_price.description: Discounted sale price. Must include $ symbol.

total_label.description: Label before the total price in second pricing block.

cta_text.description: Call-to-action button text. Must be enthusiastic and action-oriented.

rejection_text.description: Rejection link anchor text. What the customer says no to.
rejection_text.example: No thanks, I don't want to upgrade my order

rejection_reason.description: Rejection link reason. Explains the consequence of saying no (paying more later).
rejection_reason.example: When I run out I'll just pay the full price of $47 per bottle on my next order.
